mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-obPickingManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectTotPickingConfirmTargetList - 총량피킹 상품코드/로케이션 별 피킹확정 가능대상 조회 */ SELECT PTD.CTKEY ,PTD.OWKEY ,PTD.PIHDKEY ,PTD.IVATKEY ,PTD.ICKEY ,PTD.LCKEY ,PTD.CELLKEY ,PTD.UOM ,(PTD.EXPCTQTY - PTD.PKFAILQTY) - PTD.CNFRMQTY AS PKABLEQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_PI_TOT_DT PTD INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT IVAT ON PTD.CTKEY = IVAT.CTKEY AND PTD.OWKEY = IVAT.OWKEY AND PTD.IVATKEY = IVAT.IVATKEY WHERE PTD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND PTD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND PTD.PIHDKEY = #{pihdkey} AND PTD.ICKEY = #{ickey} AND PTD.LCKEY = #{lckey} AND PTD.CELLKEY = #{cellkey} AND PTD.PKWKSTATUSCD = '00' AND (PTD.EXPCTQTY - PTD.PKFAILQTY) - PTD.CNFRMQTY > 0 ORDER BY IVAT.IVATKEY

/* wms-outbound-obPickingManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectPickingDetailConfirmTarget - 피킹 상세 피킹확정대상 조회 */ SELECT PD.CTKEY ,PD.OWKEY ,PD.PIHDKEY ,PD.PIDTKEY ,PD.ICKEY ,PD.IVATKEY ,PD.LCKEY ,PD.CELLKEY ,PD.ICUNITKEY ,PD.UOM ,PD.EXPCTQTY ,PD.FROMLCKEY AS FRLCKEY ,PD.FROMCELLKEY AS FRCELLKEY ,PD.TOLCKEY AS TOLCKEY ,PD.TOCELLKEY AS TOCELLKEY ,PD.OBHDKEY ,PD.OBDTKEY ,PH.PKDIVCD FROM TWORK_INFO_PI_HD PH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_PI_DT PD ON PH.CTKEY = PD.CTKEY AND PH.OWKEY = PD.OWKEY AND PH.PIHDKEY = PD.PIHDKEY WHERE PD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND PD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND PD.PIHDKEY = #{pihdkey} AND PD.PIDTKEY = #{pidtkey} AND PD.PKDTWKSTATUSCD = '00' AND PH.PKWKSTATUSCD = '00'

/* wms-outbound-obPickingManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectPickingHeaderByPihdkey - 피킹 헤더 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY ,OWKEY ,PIHDKEY ,PKDIVCD ,PIHDNM ,PKWKSTATUSCD ,OBREQDAY ,WAHDKEY ,OBHDKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_PI_HD WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND PIHDKEY = #{pihdkey}

/* wms-outbound-obPickingManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectOutboundDetailByIckey - 피킹지시된 출고상세 데이터 조회 */ SELECT PD.CTKEY ,PD.OWKEY ,PD.OBHDKEY ,PD.OBDTKEY ,PD.ICKEY ,PD.PIHDKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_PI_DT PD ON OH.CTKEY = PD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = PD.OWKEY AND OH.PIHDKEY = PD.PIHDKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = PD.OBHDKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.OBHDKEY = COALESCE(#{pkobhdkey}, #{obhdkey}) AND PD.ICKEY = #{ickey} GROUP BY PD.CTKEY ,PD.OWKEY ,PD.OBHDKEY ,PD.OBDTKEY ,PD.ICKEY ,PD.PIHDKEY

/* wms-outbound-obPickingManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectPickingDetailListByOutboundDetail - 출고상세에 해당하는 피킹상세 데이터 조회 */ SELECT PD.CTKEY ,PD.OWKEY ,PD.PIHDKEY ,PD.PIDTKEY ,PD.ICKEY ,PD.IVATKEY ,PD.LCKEY ,PD.CELLKEY ,PD.EXPCTQTY ,PD.CNFRMQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_PI_DT PD ON OD.CTKEY = PD.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = PD.OWKEY AND OD.OBHDKEY = PD.OBHDKEY AND OD.OBDTKEY = PD.OBDTKEY WHERE OD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OD.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND OD.OBDTKEY = #{obdtkey} AND PD.EXPCTQTY - PD.CNFRMQTY > 0 ORDER BY PD.IVATKEY, PD.LCKEY

/* wms-outbound-obPickingManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectPickingTotalDetailListNonAllotment - 총량피킹상세 미분배 데이터 BY PIHDKEY, ICKEY */ SELECT PTD.CTKEY ,PTD.OWKEY ,PTD.PIHDKEY ,PD.PIDTKEY ,'10' AS PKDTWKSTATUSCD ,PTD.ICKEY ,PTD.IVATKEY ,PTD.LCKEY ,PTD.CELLKEY ,IC.ICUNITKEY ,PTD.UOM ,0 AS EXPCTQTY ,PTD.CNFRMQTY - PTD.DISPQTY AS REMAINQTY ,PTD.LCKEY AS FROMLCKEY ,PTD.LCKEY AS FROMCELLKEY ,'PICKTO' AS TOLCKEY ,'PICKTO' AS TOCELLKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_PI_TOT_DT PTD INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT IVAT ON PTD.CTKEY = IVAT.CTKEY AND PTD.OWKEY = IVAT.OWKEY AND PTD.IVATKEY = IVAT.IVATKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON PTD.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND PTD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND PTD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_PI_DT PD ON PTD.CTKEY = PD.CTKEY AND PTD.OWKEY = PD.OWKEY AND PTD.PIHDKEY = PD.PIHDKEY AND PTD.ICKEY = PD.ICKEY AND PTD.IVATKEY = PD.IVATKEY AND PTD.LCKEY = PD.LCKEY AND PTD.CELLKEY = PD.CELLKEY AND PD.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND PD.OBDTKEY = #{obdtkey} WHERE PTD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND PTD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND PTD.PIHDKEY = #{pihdkey} AND PTD.ICKEY = #{ickey} AND PTD.CNFRMQTY - PTD.DISPQTY > 0 /*총량피킹 분배잔여수량이 존재하는 건*/ ORDER BY PTD.IVATKEY, PTD.LCKEY

/* wms-outbound-obPickingManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectPickingTotalDetailListNonPicking - 총량피킹상세 미피킹 데이터 BY PIHDKEY, ICKEY */ SELECT PTD.CTKEY ,PTD.OWKEY ,PTD.PIHDKEY ,PD.PIDTKEY ,'10' AS PKDTWKSTATUSCD ,PTD.ICKEY ,PTD.IVATKEY ,PTD.LCKEY ,PTD.CELLKEY ,IC.ICUNITKEY ,PTD.UOM ,0 AS EXPCTQTY ,(PTD.EXPCTQTY - PTD.PKFAILQTY) - PTD.CNFRMQTY AS REMAINQTY ,PTD.LCKEY AS FROMLCKEY ,PTD.LCKEY AS FRLCKEY ,PTD.LCKEY AS FROMCELLKEY ,'PICKTO' AS TOLCKEY ,'PICKTO' AS TOCELLKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_PI_TOT_DT PTD INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT IVAT ON PTD.CTKEY = IVAT.CTKEY AND PTD.OWKEY = IVAT.OWKEY AND PTD.IVATKEY = IVAT.IVATKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON PTD.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND PTD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND PTD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_PI_DT PD ON PTD.CTKEY = PD.CTKEY AND PTD.OWKEY = PD.OWKEY AND PTD.PIHDKEY = PD.PIHDKEY AND PTD.ICKEY = PD.ICKEY AND PTD.IVATKEY = PD.IVATKEY AND PTD.LCKEY = PD.LCKEY AND PTD.CELLKEY = PD.CELLKEY AND PD.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND PD.OBDTKEY = #{obdtkey} WHERE PTD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND PTD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND PTD.PIHDKEY = #{pihdkey} AND PTD.ICKEY = #{ickey} AND (PTD.EXPCTQTY - PTD.PKFAILQTY) - PTD.CNFRMQTY > 0 /*총량피킹 확정 잔여수량이 존재하는 건*/ ORDER BY PTD.IVATKEY, PTD.LCKEY

/* wms-outbound-obPickingManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectPickingDetailConfirmCancelTarget - 피킹 상세 피킹확정취소 조회 */ SELECT PD.CTKEY ,PD.OWKEY ,PD.PIHDKEY ,PD.PIDTKEY ,PD.ICKEY ,PD.IVATKEY ,PD.LCKEY ,PD.CELLKEY ,PD.ICUNITKEY ,PD.UOM ,PD.EXPCTQTY ,PD.FROMLCKEY AS FRLCKEY ,PD.FROMCELLKEY AS FRCELLKEY ,PD.TOLCKEY AS TOLCKEY ,PD.TOCELLKEY AS TOCELLKEY ,PD.OBHDKEY ,PD.OBDTKEY ,PH.PKDIVCD ,PD.CNFRMQTY ,PD.CNFRMQTY AS CNCLQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_PI_HD PH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_PI_DT PD ON PH.CTKEY = PD.CTKEY AND PH.OWKEY = PD.OWKEY AND PH.PIHDKEY = PD.PIHDKEY WHERE PD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND PD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND PD.PIHDKEY = #{pihdkey} AND PD.PIDTKEY = #{pidtkey} AND PD.PKDTWKSTATUSCD = '10'

/* wms-outbound-obPickingManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectPickingHeaderByPickingHeaderKey - 피킹헤더조회 BY 피킹헤더코드 */ SELECT CTKEY ,OWKEY ,PIHDKEY ,PKDIVCD ,PIHDNM ,PKWKSTATUSCD ,OBREQDAY ,WAHDKEY ,OBHDKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_PI_HD WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND PIHDKEY = #{pihdkey}
